summary: Matched Dolphin OS initialization code by replacing a large inline-assembly/NOT_IMPLEMENTED OSInit implementation with C, moving OS_data.s data and sbss into OSInit.c, and cleaning related declarations in OSInit.h and db.{c,h}. The PR body says it was based on Prime decomp and still needed cleanup, and review feedback confirms some stylistic and type choices remained under discussion.
what_changed: Reworked src/dolphin/os/OSInit.c heavily, replacing the previous inline asm OSInit path and NOT_IMPLEMENTED fallback with a C implementation for OSInit.
Deleted asm/dolphin/os/OS_data.s and removed its object from obj_files.mk, folding its data/sbss responsibilities into C-side definitions in OSInit.c.

Introduced more meaningful OSInit-side types and constants, including OSBootInfo fields for DVDDiskID, magic, version, memorySize, consoleType, arenaLo, arenaHi, FSTLocation, and FSTMaxLength; an OSConsoleType enum; BI2Debug; OS_BI2_DEBUG_ADDRESS; OS_DEBUG_ADDRESS_2; OS_EXCEPTIONTABLE_ADDR; and OS_DBJUMPPOINT_ADDR.

Changed formerly broad extern unk_t declarations around OS init state into more specific types where evidenced, such as static OSBootInfo* BootInfo, static u32* BI2DebugFlag, static bool AreWeInitialized, OSTime __OSStartTime, extern bool __DVDLongFileNameFlag, extern u32 __PADSpec, and extern void _db_stack_end(void).
Updated OSGetConsoleType to return the named OS_CONSOLE_ARTHUR enum value instead of the literal 0x10000002 when BootInfo is absent or has consoleType 0.
Added db.h include usage and declared bool __DBIsExceptionMarked(u8 exception) in src/dolphin/db/db.h.
Renamed __DBIsExceptionMarked's parameter from a to exception and changed its return type from int to bool while preserving the u8 exception index type.

Converted at least part of exception setup from inline asm/placeholder into C: diff evidence shows static void OSExceptionInit(void), use of OSExceptionTable, exception vector copy/flush/invalidate behavior, __OSGetExceptionHandler/__OSSetExceptionHandler declarations in OSInit.h, and remaining MWERKS_GEKKO asm for low-level vector snippets.
smart_moves: Used a known external decompilation reference: the PR body explicitly says the work was based on Prime decomp, which likely accelerated matching for complex Dolphin OS startup code.

Kept truly low-level exception vector routines in MWERKS_GEKKO asm while converting higher-level OSInit and OSExceptionInit control flow to C, reducing asm without overreaching on code that is naturally vector/SPR-sensitive.
Replaced magic console-type literals with an enum, improving readability while retaining exact numeric values used by Dolphin OS console detection.
Modeled fixed hardware and boot memory addresses with named macros and AT_ADDRESS declarations, making hardware register and boot-info accesses searchable and less error-prone.
Preserved the compiler workaround around the unused inline asm __OSFPRInit by documenting the peephole issue and leaving #pragma peephole off under MUST_MATCH.
Made data ownership cleaner by eliminating a standalone OS_data.s object once the strings/state could be represented from C, simplifying obj_files.mk and future symbol tracking.
decomp_lessons: For Dolphin OS code, moving from assembly to C may require reconstructing not only functions but also adjacent .data and .sbss symbols; deleting the asm data file must be paired with correct C definitions and build list updates.

Boot ROM and BI2 structures should be modeled with real fields once offsets are understood; this lets code express BootInfo->arenaLo, BootInfo->arenaHi, BootInfo->consoleType, and DebugInfo->debugFlag instead of raw offsets.
Use named constants for fixed GameCube addresses such as 0x800000F4, 0x800030E9, 0x80003000/exception table areas, and PI register regions to make decompiled code auditable.
Small type choices can matter for matching and ABI: reviewer discussion around __DBIsExceptionMarked notes that the exception parameter really needed to stay u8 rather than a wider OSException type.
C decompilation can still leave embedded asm islands for exception vectors and branch-to-absolute-address stubs; partial conversion is acceptable when those routines are hard to express safely in C.
When a match requires compiler pragmas, document the exact reason, e.g. a peephole optimizer bug triggered by an inline asm function, instead of leaving a vague TODO.
naming_conventions: Use OS-prefixed enums for Dolphin OS constants, as shown by OSConsoleType and values OS_CONSOLE_RETAIL, OS_CONSOLE_EMULATOR, OS_CONSOLE_PC_EMULATOR, OS_CONSOLE_ARTHUR, and OS_CONSOLE_MINNOW.
Use descriptive parameter names for narrow integral indices, e.g. __DBIsExceptionMarked(u8 exception) instead of u8 a.

Internal Dolphin OS symbols retained double-underscore prefixes where matching existing SDK-style names: __OSStartTime, __OSDeviceCode, __OSDBINTSTART, __OSDBINTEND, __OSDBJUMPSTART, __OSDBJUMPEND, __OSEVStart, __OSEVEnd, __OSGetExceptionHandler, and __OSSetExceptionHandler.
Hardware-address and boot-address macros used uppercase names with OS_ prefixes, including OS_BI2_DEBUG_ADDRESS, OS_DEBUG_ADDRESS_2, OS_DBJUMPPOINT_ADDR, and OS_EXCEPTIONTABLE_ADDR.
Structure names reflected SDK concepts rather than anonymous placeholders: OSBootInfo and BI2Debug replaced opaque char padding/unk_t-heavy declarations where offsets were known.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Removed asm/dolphin/os/OS_data.s and its obj_files.mk entry after migrating the OSInit strings, BootInfo, BI2DebugFlag, BI2DebugFlagHolder, AreWeInitialized, OSExceptionTable, and __OSStartTime data responsibilities into C.

Converted OSInit from a large inline asm block to C while preserving behavior such as one-time initialization, __OSGetSystemTime, OSDisableInterrupts, BootInfo setup, BI2 debug loading, arena bounds setup, subsystem initialization, console reporting, ClearArena, and OSEnableInterrupts.
Used exact-address declarations and volatile structs for memory-mapped state, including __OSDeviceCode at OS_BASE_CACHED | 0x30E6 and OS_PI at 0xCC003000.
Kept #pragma peephole off under MUST_MATCH with an explicit note that the workaround is tied to inline asm function __OSFPRInit.
Preserved low-level asm for vector-related routines where diff evidence shows asm void __OSDBIntegrator, __OSDBJump, OSExceptionVector, and OSDefaultExceptionHandler remained or were reshaped.
OSExceptionInit C reconstruction used memcpy plus cache maintenance calls in the diff excerpt, including DCFlushRangeNoSync, sync, and ICInvalidateRange after copying exception/debug-vector code.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.comment: Asked whether OSException would match for the __DBIsExceptionMarked parameter instead of u8.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.comment: Replied that the parameters really do need to be u8.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.comment: Requested that in the future comments be placed above the line they describe, not beside; explicitly said no immediate change was required.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that clean up comments or style in src/dolphin/os/OSInit.c after PR 696.
Find later changes to __DBIsExceptionMarked or OSException typedef usage to see whether u8 remained required.
Find PRs that further decompile Dolphin OS exception/vector code left in MWERKS_GEKKO asm.
Search for additional migrations of asm/dolphin/os/*.s data into C and their obj_files.mk removal pattern.
Search for uses of OSBootInfo, BI2Debug, and OSConsoleType introduced or moved to shared headers after this PR.
